title: begonia asperifolia var. tomentosa
intro: Begonia asperifolia var. tomentosa, also known as the fuzzy angel wing begonia, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the Begoniaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
